Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly elevated chloride, total cholesterol, and LDL cholesterol, which may increase cardiovascular risk. Glucose metabolism and renal function are normal. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend monitoring lipid profile and considering cardiovascular risk management as clinically indicated.
